title: Why Do I Feel Fat at 103 Pounds?! 😭 #storytime #shorts (Part 1)
topic:
Reddit post from r/teenagers:

126 to 103

im 17 and i think i need help. last year in february i was 126 lbs. after ramadan, i became 121lbs on april 2023. then i started losing more by skipping meals and became 102lbs by march 2024. it's ramadan again and somehow i gained 1lbs and im 103 now. im 5'1 and i feel like bc im so short i need to be under 100lbs. my goal is 98lbs and ik it's bad and idk how to stop. i lost a lot of hair over the year and ik it's cuz of my eating habits and losing weight. idk how to make myself stop. i look in the mirror and still think im fat
summary: So, I'm over here thinking I'm fat at 103 pounds—like, what's wrong with me, bro? Wallah, it's wild how we chase these numbers instead of just being healthy. Yallah, let’s talk about it! I'm 17 and I lowkey feel like I need help. Last February, I was 126 pounds. After Ramadan, I dropped to 121. But then I started skipping meals, and by March, I was down to 102. Now it's Ramadan again, and somehow I'm 103. I'm 5'1, and I feel like because I'm so short, I need to be under 100 pounds. My goal is 98, and I know it's bad, but I don't know how to stop. I’ve lost so much hair this year, and I know it
cliffhanger: My family, my friends, they all have these expectations, and I feel like I'm drowning under them
